description: List of 57 names, in some cases indicating their profession (many are physicians, also common are pharmacists, silk merchants, and silk weavers and dyers), beginning with ‘Abū Naṣr ibn Dāwūd and his father’. Among the names listed (line 7) there is Dāʾūd ibn al-Rayyīs, possibly the son of the Nagid Abraham Maimonides and grandson of Maimonides. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימת 57 שמות עם ציון מקצועם (רבים רופאים, גם רוקחים, סוחרי משי וצבעי משי); בראשה אבו נצר בן דאוד ואביו
